# Neverwinter Nights

Monsters: Zombies (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Zombies%20901eef0e94024304bb9512fee842e3b3.md), Demons (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Demons%203bf815864dfc4a56ad90365b197f7dd9.md)
Motivations: Cozy horror (../../Features/Cozy%20horror%20e5cc80dc61ed4c629951cdf472b20b7a.md), Surreal (../../Features/Surreal%20cee6644b68094859bf1b17c5e7fd25de.md), Dangerous city (../../Features/Dangerous%20city%20f2ec9bb510dc440b96920e4651a259be.md), A city facing divine wrath (../../Features/A%20city%20facing%20divine%20wrath%20b11bb95047984243aaffb7024af8b77b.md), Adventure (../../Features/Adventure%201d458e628ba28026830dfe3db74cba19.md)
Pacing: Days (../Pacing%20types/Days%2092a81bedac4640db9d9b6f8ba4046254.md)

Story scale: Full story (../Story%20scales/Full%20story%20faaea9bcaf0f43b5ae79dfa06b96be34.md)

Weighted Use: 12
Wonder: 1

<aside>
💡 Neverwinter Nights doesn’t actually involve divine wrath, though divine wrath is actually a better explanation for its opening scenario of a city in crisis than its actual explanation.

</aside>
